text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I return from training to find a letter sitting on my
desk.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I do remember locking my office to be on the safe
side, though...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: That letter... It showed up out of nowhere.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Is it addressed to you? Or is it...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Opening the envelope, I see that it's clearly a fan
letter for Manhattan Cafe, but there's something
a little... peculiar about its contents.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: This is no normal fan letter, that's for sure...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
What's the matter? Is there something wrong with
it?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I figure she has the right to read her own fan
letter, so I hand it over.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I am always here, watching over you...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I think I know what this letter's about...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps not all of my fans belong to the
corporeal realm.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Just as I can see them, they watch over and cheer for me...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: And that makes me very happy...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I store the letter in the desk drawer, only for it to
disappear without a trace the following day.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps she's right, and it was the work of some
unseen admirer...
